interviewPerUser.description: Build reusable question groups for interviews. This library is separate from company interview settings.

mailTemplates.deleteText: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

rejectionTab.companySelectorHelp: Switch company context to manage another rejection reason set.
rejectionTab.reasonLibraryDesc: Drag and drop to reorder reasons. Keep reasons short and clear for consistent rejection communication.

statusSettings.title: Status Labels
statusSettings.description: Customize your company's statuses, colors, default stage, and notifications. Drag and drop to reorder.
statusSettings.companySelectorHelp: Pick the company profile to manage statuses for.
statusSettings.previewDesc: Live preview of how statuses will appear in lists and applicant cards.
statusSettings.noteText: The Interview, Rejected, and Trashed statuses are system-protected. Only their colors can be customized. Other properties cannot be modified.
